ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major (e.g., ZOOLOGY, EDUCATIONAL PSYCHOLOGY) */,
  "major_category" TEXT /* Category of the major (e.g., Biology & Life Science, Psychology & Social Work) */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "average_completion_time" REAL /* Average time to complete the major (in years) */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Average tuition fee for the major */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Whether the major is currently offered (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment data */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of people employed in the major */,
  "men" INTEGER /* Number of men employed in the major */,
  "women" INTEGER /* Number of women employed in the major */,
  "share_women" REAL /* Proportion of women employed in the major */,
  "graduate_rate" REAL /* Percentage of graduates */,
  "employment_sector" TEXT /* Sector of employment (e.g., Government, Private, Non-profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_outcomes" (
  "job_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job outcome entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the job outcome data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data */,
  "employed" INTEGER /* Number of people employed */,
  "part_time" INTEGER /* Number of people employed part-time */,
  "full_time_year_round" INTEGER /* Number of people employed full-time year-round */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of people unemployed */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the major */,
  "job_satisfaction" REAL /* Average job satisfaction score */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Primary location of employment (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_outcomes_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_data" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary data entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary data */,
  "median" INTEGER /* Median salary for the major */,
  "p25th" INTEGER /* 25th percentile salary for the major */,
  "p75th" INTEGER /* 75th percentile salary for the major */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the major */,
  "salary_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of salary growth over the past few years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the job type data */,
  "college_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of college jobs */,
  "non_college_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of non-college jobs */,
  "low_wage_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of low-wage jobs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Common job titles for the major */,
  "job_requirements" TEXT /* Common job requirements (e.g., specific skills, certifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_types_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the researcher belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., Interactive, Static) */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, Database) */,
  "data_source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was established */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
